problem:
How do I debug Node.js applications?.

How do I debug a Node.js server application?

Right now I'm mostly using alert debugging with print statements like this:

sys.puts(sys.inspect(someVariable));

There must be a better way to debug. I know that Google Chrome has a command-line debugger. Is this debugger available for Node.js as well?

(npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
